title: Brookfield India REIT is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Brookfield India REIT is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Property Advisor looking for your next big career move? Brookfield India REIT in Hyderabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Brookfield India REIT:
Brookfield India REIT is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Brookfield India REIT!
